statement: In every magma, Equation 1000 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (y * y))`) implies Equation 1618 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (w * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0229
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op y y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op w x)))
